value.description:
A simple woven basket for storing a small number of goods. Items stored inside will not deteriorate over time and have no impact on the beauty of their surroundings. \n\n<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 2 Stack per tile: 2
Allowed items: Everything

A larger woven basket with extra capacity for storing goods. Items stored inside will not deteriorate over time and have no impact on the beauty of their surroundings. \n\n<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 3 Stack per tile: 3
Allowed items: Everything

A large, reinforced woven basket for storing various goods. Items stored inside will not deteriorate over time and have no impact on the beauty of their surroundings. \n\n<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 4 Stack per tile: 4
Allowed items: Everything

A covered clay pot for storing a small number of items. Items stored inside do not affect the beauty of their surroundings. \n\n<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 3 Stack per tile: 3
Allowed items: Everything

An uncovered clay pot for storing a small number of items. Items stored inside do not affect the beauty of their surroundings. \n\n<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 3 Stack per tile: 3
Allowed items: Everything

A large structure for keeping plant food dry. Items stored inside will not deteriorate and have no impact on the beauty of their surroundings. \n\n<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 45 Stack per tile: 5
Allowed items: Raw plant food, Plant matter

A designated spot to pile wood logs. Free to build. Items stored will not deteriorate and have no impact on the beauty of their surroundings. \n\n<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 12 Stack per tile: 4
Allowed items: Wood logs

A small designated spot to pile wood logs. Free to build. Items stored will not deteriorate and have no impact on the beauty of their surroundings. \n\n<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 2 Stack per tile: 2
Allowed items: Wood logs

A tent for storing various items. Items stored inside will not deteriorate and have no impact on the beauty of their surroundings. \n\n<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 27 Stack per tile: 3
Allowed items: Everything

A primitive rack for storing weapons. Does not prevent deterioration. Items stored have no impact on the beauty of their surroundings. \n\n<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 8 Stack per tile: 4
Allowed items: Everything
